title: Department Manager Vacancy at PC Jeweller - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at PC Jeweller - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, PC Jeweller in Coimbatore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About PC Jeweller:
PC Jeweller is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PC Jeweller!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
